title: SALVATION ARMY FAMILY STORE - 211info
text: SALVATION ARMY SOCIAL SERVICES SALVATION ARMY FAMILY STORE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Operates a resale thrift store. Donations are accepted and pick up may be available. 922 N Central Avenue Medford, OR 97501 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Store: Monday-Saturday 9am-6pm Donation drop-off: Monday-Saturday 9:30am-4:30pm (541) 773-6965 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 773-6965 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in FEES: Varies by item DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Jackson County SITE HOURS: Monday/Tuesday/Thursday/Friday 9am-noon and 1pm-3pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: RVTD bus line 40 Services: Donation Drop Off Points Thrift Shops Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - FOOD PANTRY HOUSING/SHELTER - ASSISTANCE FOR OLDER ADULTS MATERIAL GOODS - SOCIAL SERVICES AND EMERGENCY AID If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
